title: Largest Submatrix With Rearrangements
titleCn: 重新排列后的最大子矩阵

testcases.input: matrix = [[0,0,1],[1,1,1],[1,0,1]] Output: 4 Explanation: You can rearrange the columns as shown above. The largest submatrix of 1s, in bold, has an area of 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: You can rearrange the columns as shown above. The largest submatrix of 1s, in bold, has an area of 4.

testcases.input: matrix = [[1,0,1,0,1]] Output: 3 Explanation: You can rearrange the columns as shown above. The largest submatrix of 1s, in bold, has an area of 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: You can rearrange the columns as shown above. The largest submatrix of 1s, in bold, has an area of 3.

testcases.input: matrix = [[1,1,0],[1,0,1]] Output: 2 Explanation: Notice that you must rearrange entire columns, and there is no way to make a submatrix of 1s larger than an area of 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Notice that you must rearrange entire columns, and there is no way to make a submatrix of 1s larger than an area of 2.
